title: Ray gun
description: Ray gun adds a Ray gun. Ray gun is a gun.... wow. If ray gun hits block this block and nearby blocks will explode. pro tip: don't throw ray gun away!
body:
### Ray gun
1. **Ray gun adds a gun.** With this gun you can do alot of this like..... shoot.
2. If you shoot with ray gun on block it will explode. If you shoot player with ray gun there would be explode.
3. Don't throw ray gun away! ( _This mod have got sounds, shooting sounds_ )
4. Ray gun has got big knockback and even bigger damage!
5. Ray gun doesn't have durability!
6. How to craft ray gun? ![How to craft ray gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3fc9281d4ea726d406066ae0e6d01ebaa90237a.png)
7. **Video that's show how ray gun works!**<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cHRTDloVD9U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
